title: Magnus the Red: Master of Prospero

curation.synopsis: The Imperial world of Morningstar is tearing itself apart, and Magnus the Red brings the Thousand Sons to lift as many of its people off the surface as he can before the planet kills them. The XV Legion is still under-strength after the flesh-change, so he calls on his brother Perturabo and the Iron Warriors to share the work. The mission stops being a simple evacuation almost as soon as it begins. There is something old buried on Morningstar that Magnus needs, knowledge from before the Long Night, and a cult of the Stormlord is determined that no one else should reach it. The book sits squarely on the line between Magnus the scholar who genuinely wants to save people and Magnus the prideful seeker who never quite walks away from a forbidden door.
